title: aegilops peregrina
intro: Aegilops peregrina, also known as the migratory grass or wild goatgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Aegilops peregrina include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Aegilops peregrina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it may also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
